headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on MarketAxess Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $130
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Alexander Blostein   maintains MarketAxess Holdings (NASDAQ:MKTX) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $168 to $130.
